text: watching my new tweet scheduler post its first live tweet from a json queue. cost so far, roughly one cent. next step, wire the runner into github actions so my laptop stops being the bottleneck. #buildinpublic #indiehackers #devtools

X API gotcha for anyone setting up posting. changing app permissions to read+write does not update your existing access tokens. they keep the OLD scope. regenerate the access token after every permission change or posting returns 403. #buildinpublic #devtools #coding
